message:
feat(ci): add must-pass gate lineage metadata, harden evidence bundle, and promote gate to PASS

Add run_id and correlation_id lineage tracking to the must-pass extension
gate (bd-1f42.4.4) so that every verdict artifact can be traced back to the
exact CI run and correlated across gate events:

ci_full_suite_gate.rs:
- New `validate_must_pass_lineage_metadata()` verifies run_id, correlation_id,
  and freshness (generated_at within 7-day window, max 5-min future skew)
- New `check_must_pass_gate_artifact()` replaces generic `check_artifact_status`
  for the ext_must_pass gate, adding lineage validation on top of status check
- 4 new unit tests covering fresh metadata acceptance, missing run_id,
  correlation/run_id mismatch, and stale generated_at rejection

ext_conformance_generated.rs:
- MustPassGateVerdict struct gains `run_id` and `correlation_id` fields
- New `resolve_must_pass_gate_lineage()` resolves run identity from
  GITHUB_RUN_ID → CI_RUN_ID → local timestamp fallback chain
- Gate event JSONL lines now emit run_id and correlation_id per event
- Verdict JSON write switched from `let _ = write` to `expect()` with
  non-empty assertion for fail-closed safety
- Markdown report now includes Run ID and Correlation ID header lines
- 3 new unit tests covering env-var priority, fallback, and whitespace handling

ci_evidence_bundle.rs:
- must_pass_gate artifact source changed from directory to specific
  must_pass_gate_verdict.json file with schema validation (pi.ext.must_pass_gate)
- Added separate must_pass_gate_events source for the JSONL event log
- New `validate_must_pass_gate_payload()` extracts and validates status,
  generated_at, run_id, correlation_id, and observed counts
- Section collector now reports diagnostics on schema mismatch, missing schema,
  and JSON parse failures instead of silent "invalid" status
- 2 new unit tests for source shape assertions and payload validation

.gitignore:
- Whitelist gate/ directory and its three report files under
  tests/ext_conformance/reports/

Gate results (full_suite_gate/):
- ext_must_pass gate status promoted from skip → pass, full suite verdict
  flips from FAIL → PASS (15/15 gates, 9/9 blocking)
- Updated events JSONL, report markdown, and verdict JSON accordingly

New artifacts:
- tests/ext_conformance/reports/gate/{must_pass_gate_verdict.json,
  must_pass_events.jsonl, must_pass_gate_report.md}
- tests/perf/reports/extension_benchmark_stratification.json

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -24,6 +24,10 @@ tests/ext_conformance/reports/*
 !tests/ext_conformance/reports/conformance_baseline.json
 !tests/ext_conformance/reports/conformance_summary.json
 !tests/ext_conformance/reports/COMPATIBILITY_SUMMARY.md
+!tests/ext_conformance/reports/gate/
+!tests/ext_conformance/reports/gate/must_pass_gate_verdict.json
+!tests/ext_conformance/reports/gate/must_pass_events.jsonl
+!tests/ext_conformance/reports/gate/must_pass_gate_report.md
 
 # sqlite databases and WAL/SHM artifacts
 storage.sqlite3
